title: Central Bank of India – Faculty,Office Assistant and More – 7 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Faculty, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Faculty, OfficeAssistant, Attendant, Watchman-Gardener. Candidates with 7th, 10th, Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Central Bank of India official website centralbank.bank.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 7th pass for Watchman/Gardener, Matriculate for Attendant, Graduate for Office Assistant, Graduate with specific degrees for Faculty.

salary_details.pay_scale: Faculty: Rs. 30000/month, Office Assistant: Rs. 20000/month, Attendant: Rs. 14000/month, Watchman/Gardener: Rs. 12000/month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
